Title: DIAMOND acoustic pods
Body (HTML): Arranging the available workspace in the right way by providing employees with space for individual work, video conferencing, meetings, and brainstorming makes the workplace much more employee-friendly. Such arrangements are possible thanks to acoustic pods — VANK’s mobile rooms designed for 2, 3, 4, and 6. Thanks to the special design and the use of sound-absorbing materials, the pods effectively block outside noise and suppress the sound generated inside. DIAMOND panels with their three-dimensional structure act as diffusers to break up sound waves, bringing well-being to the office. They can be made of a biocomposite or non-woven rPET — grey or upholstered. The pods feature a safety glass door and come with connection panels, a ventilation system, energy-efficient LED ceiling lighting, a sound system, a TV screen mount, and a control panel which measures: lighting intensity, air purity, and noise levels. The pod is also available in a mobile version — on wheels. Acoustic pods will work well not only in office environments but also at event venues, in hotels, in public office buildings, and at airports.

Body (HTML): VANK_DIAMOND state-of-the-art acoustic panels are a combination of pro-environmental values and every individual’s need for well-being. Our proprietary technology makes use of renewable, recycled, and bio-based materials, and produces shapes that provide sound attenuation and make rooms soundproof. Acoustic panels are offered in width options of 80, 120, and 160 cm.

Title: FLIP acoustic screens
Body (HTML):
VANK_FLIP acoustic screens are a modern, aesthetic and mobile system for flexible space division in open-plan offices. Thanks to their modular design and mobile bases, they allow for the quick creation of meeting zones, focus areas or relaxation spots – exactly where they are needed.

Their signature feature are the three-dimensional BRICKS panels, inspired by the form of building bricks, which not only bring a bold architectural character but also deliver excellent acoustic performance (αw = 0.90). Panels are available in three material versions: biocomposite (flax and hemp), recycled rPET, or upholstered in a selected fabric

VANK_FLIP can be connected in a straight line, at 90° or 135° angles, and configured in two heights with two base types – a steel base on braked castors or a plywood base with concealed castors. Rotating panels allow users to open selected fragments of the wall, creating transparent sections that let more light through. Thanks to the rotating panels, users can control their level of accessibility by opening or closing individual panels, creating window-like openings in the wall. Additional functionality comes with hanging shelves that can be integrated into the screens.

Design: dr Anna Vonhausen (screen), Bidermann+Wide (BRICKS panels).

Title: SCREEN_HOME acoustic screens
Body (HTML): The contemporary practice of remote work calls for a functional home office, often connected to a living room or a dining room. Arranging a separate place to work at home within a shared environment is possible thanks to the VANK_SCREEN acoustic wall system. Tall partitions forming a ‘screen’ make it possible to separate oneself temporarily from the indoor noise and focus on the tasks at hand. Such a screen will also work well as an information board or a background during a videoconference. A lightweight screen consisting of two, three or more wings can be formed and arranged in any way you see fit. The triangular plywood bases can be easily disassembled, enabling convenient storage of partitions. The hallmarks of the VANK_SCREEN system are neutral, smooth walls, upholstered with SONUS fabric in felt finish, which demonstrates good sound-absorbing properties. The A-grade sound absorption — both in the office and at home — has a significant positive impact on the user’s health and ability to focus. It reduces the level of stress caused by noise.

Title: CO desks and tables
Body (HTML): VANK_CO are mobile tables for quick meetings and spontaneous conversations. A perfect solution to join your colleagues for a moment to get down to the nitty-gritty of the project you’re working on. The name comes from the concept of coworking, where cooperation and building a harmonious community is a priority. The sturdy plate base is optionally available with castors and a column with pneumatic height adjustment. The top is made of eco-friendly SwissCDF board. These modern tables will work well in VANK acoustic pods, creative areas at whiteboards, project workspaces, and corporate cafés and cafeterias. COs on wheels — adapted to be used with swivel chairs — can be single-person hot-desk systems for acoustic pods or units that can be moved easily across coworking spaces as necessary.

Title: CUBE desks and tables
Body (HTML):
The collection of desks and tables includes a desk for individual work, a double desk, a high desk for standing work, a high table for meetings, a front office desk, and a lectern to give presentations. The user can create new forms and turn existing furniture into original, imaginative arrangements. This is possible thanks to the multitude of elements that complement the cube, including tops, fasteners and connectors, side panels, and plates. CUBE offers a very useful storage function - it’s possible to expose or cover items on the shelf by changing the direction in which the cube faces.

VANK_CUBE cube is a modular system of cube units manufactured using innovative biomaterial made from flax and hemp - fast-growing renewable plants that absorb much more CO2 than trees. As plant-based raw materials are its core components, it minimises the use of synthetics and contributes to the combat against climate change. The designs foster creative thinking and a culture of collaboration. It also lets individuals working remotely do their thing in a natural setting.

Design: Anna Vonhausen

Title: KRAK desks and tables
Body (HTML): KRAK tables come in two heights. They will work great as an island in the dining room or a setting for an office meeting, but also a desk in the study. Title: MOVE desks
Body (HTML): VANK_MOVE is a contemporary desk that will be a welcome addition to any workspace thanks to its functional design, simple form, and minimalist finish. It can act as an element of an individual workstation in open-space environments, in a closed office room, or in a home office setting. Modern design combined with solid legs and table top make it a perfect solution for sophisticated office spaces. MOVE is a piece of furniture for demanding users, for those who know how much performance depends on good working conditions. The user can select between a fixed (FIX) and a variable table top height. Thanks to the electric height adjustment mechanism, the table ‘keeps up’ with the user’s actions. It acts in unison with the user, adapting fully to their needs. It’s a response to latest trends and to the demand for “sit/stand” solutions at work.

Title: PEEL lounge chairs
Body (HTML): VANK_PEEL lounge chairs will be an excellent choice for common spaces in the office, reception areas, lobbies or cafés. The name PEEL emphasises the fluidity of forms resembling peelings and reminds us of the possibilities of making use of what has so far been considered waste. Thanks to a special mesh, it is possible to make use of even the smallest scraps of natural veneer. The distinctive sinuous steel frame highlights the fluidity of the design and the organic inspiration behind it. There’s also a finishing touch in the form of a seat cushion.
